name: Kaseya IT Management API
what_it_does: Kaseya REST API for IT management and MSP platform suite (VSA, BMS, and IT Complete). Enables AI agents to manage IT support tickets, access endpoint inventory and patch status, trigger remote management and scripting, manage client accounts and SLAs, access security monitoring data, handle billing and contracts, and integrate Kaseya data with external ITSM and business systems.
use_cases: Managing IT tickets and escalation workflows from MSP helpdesk automation agents
Monitoring endpoint patch compliance and triggering remediation from security agents
Accessing client device inventory and configuration data from IT asset management agents
Managing SLA tracking and billing from MSP operations automation agents
not_for: Small IT shops without managed service provider multi-client workflows
Enterprise ITSM without MSP-specific client billing and tenancy
Non-IT businesses without remote monitoring and management requirements
best_when: An MSP using Kaseya VSA or BMS wants AI agents to automate ticket management, endpoint patch compliance, security monitoring, and client billing workflows at scale.
avoid_when: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Kaseya was the target of a major supply chain ransomware attack in July 2021 (REvil). Remote access capabilities require extreme caution. Verify current security posture.

auth.notes: Kaseya uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. Account-level credentials. Partner program required for third-party integrations. Acquired Datto in 2022 — Datto APIs separate from Kaseya VSA APIs.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise IT management pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-endpoint pricing; enterprise contracts for large MSPs
pricing.notes: Miami-based, private equity-owned (Insight Partners). Largest MSP software company. Acquired Datto (2022), ID Agent, Graphus, and others. IT Complete suite combines VSA, BMS, security, and backup.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Major supply chain ransomware attack July 2021 (REvil) — verify current security posture
No public MCP server — REST API with OAuth2 and partner program
Multiple product lines (VSA, BMS, Datto) with separate APIs — clarify which product
Datto acquired 2022 — Datto API is separate from Kaseya VSA API
Multi-region data residency — verify for specific product and deployment
Legacy architecture in some modules — API maturity varies by product
agent_readiness.security_notes: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: MSP remote access platform. Supply chain attack history. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. Multi-region data residency. Extreme caution with remote access automation.

security_score_components.security_notes: MSP endpoint access platform. Supply chain attack history (2021). SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. Multi-region data residency. Historical security incident context.
